shellCommands.command: pwd && git status --short && grep -R "subscribe" -n src/logic src | head -80

sed -n '1,130p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '180,360p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1380,1435p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1550,1710p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts
grep -n "setFormState\|_formState" src/logic/createFormControl.ts | head -35; sed -n '130,190p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1,120p' src/__tests__/useForm/subscribe.test.tsx

grep -n "const _setFormState\|_setFormState =\|_setFormState" src/logic/createFormControl.ts | head -20; sed -n '370,520p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; grep -R "name:.*type\|_formState.name\|formState.name" -n src/logic/createFormControl.ts src | head -50
sed -n '520,570p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1820,1880p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '90,180p' src/__tests__/useForm/setValues.test.tsx
cat src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts; grep -n "_setFormState" -R src | head -20; grep -n "type:" src/logic/createFormControl.ts
git diff -- src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts && npm run build
